title: Condensed-matter composite
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Condensed-matter composite''' was an exotic metal alloy. The matter could diffuse harmful vibrations caused by powerful [[Engine/Legends|engines]].

It was used in the bumper of [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Simon Greyshade/Legends|Simon Greyshade's]] [[XJ-6 airspeeder/Legends|XJ-6 airspeeder]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2002-04-23 -->''[[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones Incredible Cross-Sections]]''
